title: rosa × kosinsciana var. pseudogallica
intro: Rosa × kosinsciana var. pseudogallica, commonly known as Rosa pseudogallica, is a hybrid rose species within the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds that have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Rosa pseudogallica include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin care. Herbal preparations of Rosa pseudogallica can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infused oils, often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
